info.title: --help is an unknown parameter
info.description:
Usage of the tool (argument names case insensitive, values case insensitive where marked, arguments can be given in any order):
octo-ckc [-[shortTerm] or [/ or --][longTerm] [argument value]] ...
ARGUMENT NAME                                DESCRIPTION
--command (-c)                               Required. Command that has to be executed:
Possible commands:
GENERAL
Compile:                                   Validates and creates output files for a construction kit model directory
--verbose (-v)                           Optional. Defines the verbose level: 'None' for no output, 'Detailed' for trace and debug output, otherwise 'Default'
--path (-p)                              Required. Root path of construction kit model directory
--outputPath (-o)                        Required. Output path of compiled construction kit
--cache (-c)                             Optional. If used, at the defined path a cache file is created containing all dependent construction kit models.
--compileResult (-cr)                    Optional. If used, the file path of compiled files is written to output
--localCatalogEnabled (-lce)             Optional. Enable or disable the local Construction Kit Library catalog
Config:                                    Configures the tool.
--localCatalogPath (-lcp)                Optional. Path of the local Construction Kit Library catalog
--localCatalogEnabled (-lce)             Optional. Enable or disable the local Construction Kit Library catalog
--publicGitHubRepositoryOwner (-pgo)     Optional. GitHub Repository Owner of the private GitHub catalog
--publicGitHubRepositoryName (-pgr)      Optional. GitHub Repository of the private GitHub catalog
--publicGitHubRepositoryBranch (-pgb)    Optional. GitHub Repository Branch of the private GitHub catalog
--publicGitHubApiToken (-pgt)            Optional. GitHub API token of the public GitHub catalog
--publicGitHubPagesUri (-pgp)            Optional. GitHub Pages URI to read models of the public GitHub catalog
--privateGitHubRepositoryOwner (-go)     Optional. GitHub Repository Owner of the private GitHub catalog
--privateGitHubRepositoryName (-gr)      Optional. GitHub Repository of the private GitHub catalog
--privateGitHubRepositoryBranch (-gb)    Optional. GitHub Repository Branch of the private GitHub catalog
--privateGitHubApiToken (-gt)            Optional. GitHub API token of the private GitHub catalog
--privateGitHubPagesUri (-gp)            Optional. GitHub Pages URI to read models of the private GitHub catalog
Find:                                      Lists repositories a construction kit model has been found.
--modelId (-id)                          Required. Model Id of construction kit to find, including version ranges
generateDocs:                              Generates docs from an compiled construction kit library
--file (-f)                              Required. Path of compiled construction kit model file
--output (-o)                            Required. Path of Target Directory
--link (-l)                              Required. Additional Path Segments of Link root
Get:                                       Gets a construction kit library model from the given Construction Kit catalog
--catalog (-c)                           Required. Name of the construction kit catalog. By default 'LocalFileSystemCatalog' is used.
--name (-n)                              Required. Name of the construction kit model to get.
--file (-f)                              Optional. If set, the construction kit model is stored at the given file path.
GetCatalogs:                               Gets a list of known Construction Kit catalogs
New:                                       Creates new construction kit model directory
--path (-p)                              Required. Root path of construction kit model directory
Publish:                                   Publish a compiled construction kit to a catalog
--verbose (-v)                           Optional. Defines the verbose level: 'None' for no output, 'Detailed' for trace and debug output, otherwise 'Default'
--file (-f)                              Required. Path of compiled construction kit model file
--catalog (-c)                           Optional. Name of the construction kit catalog. By default 'LocalFileSystemCatalog' is used.
--replace (-r)                           Optional. Replaces construction kits models that may exists in repo.
RefreshAllCatalogCaches:                   Refreshes the catalog cache of all catalogs which support caching
--verbose (-v)                           Optional. Defines the verbose level: 'None' for no output, 'Detailed' for trace and debug output, otherwise 'Default'
RefreshCatalogCache:                       Refreshes the catalog cache
--verbose (-v)                           Optional. Defines the verbose level: 'None' for no output, 'Detailed' for trace and debug output, otherwise 'Default'
--catalog (-c)                           Optional. Name of the construction kit catalog. By default 'LocalFileSystemCatalog' is used.
Restore:                                   Restores construction kits based on a construction kit model file.
--file (-f)                              Required. Path of the model configuration file
--outputPath (-o)                        Required. Output path of compiled construction kit
--cache (-c)                             Optional. If used, at the defined path a cache file is created containing all dependent construction kit models.
version:                                   Returns the copyright and version of the tool.
